finalized_plan.description: Use the tool to read the JSON‑LD file content from "data/gaia/validation/bec74516-02fc-48dc-b202-55e78d0e17cf.jsonld" to fetch the raw file text
Parse the JSON content to determine if the person records are at the top level or within an "@graph" property
Identify and extract all person records that contain a "works" field
For each person record with a "works" field, iterate through the list of works
Within each work, check for the publication date using the keys "publication_date", "issued", or "datePublished"
Extract the year from the publication date by determining if it is a 4‑digit year or needs parsing from an ISO date format
Count each work that has a publication year earlier than 2020
Sum the counts of all works published before 2020 and determine the total number of persons with a "works" field
Compute the average number of pre‑2020 works per person by dividing the total count by the number of persons with a "works" field

Prepare a detailed explanation of the extraction process and the computed average outcome, ensuring all components requested (short version, detailed version, additional context) are included before providing the final answer via the final_answer tool

root_cause_reasoning: The agent failed to read the target file
